candidate_definition_hints.text: Official PyTorch implementation of the paper “Explainable Deep Few-shot Anomaly Detection with Deviation Networks”, weakly/partially supervised anomaly detection, few-shot anomaly detection, image defect detection.
By Guansong Pang, Choubo Ding, Chunhua Shen, Anton van den Hengel
